name: Wix
description: Wix — Drag-and-drop website builder with app marketplace, e-commerce, and a headless CMS API option.

seo.title: Wix — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Wix: Wix — Drag-and-drop website builder with app marketplace, e-commerce, and a headless CMS API option.

when_to_use: Small business website with e-commerce in drag-and-drop editor
Headless CMS option connecting Wix content to a custom React frontend
Service booking website with integrated scheduling and payments
App marketplace extension adding custom Wix site functionality
Portfolio site with Wix templates and custom domain setup

pros: Headless CMS API usable from Next.js
cons: SEO plugins required to match WordPress
review.verdict: Still the easiest way to build a working site for non-technical owners, with a serious lock-in tradeoff.
review.best_for: Small business owners who want to DIY a site quickly without learning any tooling
review.not_for: Developers or content teams needing portability, deep SEO, or headless-first flexibility
